member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.DuplicateDetector
member.summary: Performs deterministic, read-free exact duplicate detection using normalized SHA-256 hashes.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.DuplicateDetector.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService,OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.IErrorHandler)
member.summary: Initializes a duplicate detector using shared diagnostics infrastructure.
member.param: The centralized logging service.
The handler for unexpected operation failures.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.FileClassifier
member.summary: Performs deterministic metadata-only classification.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.FileClassifier.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService,OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.IErrorHandler)
member.summary: Initializes a file classifier using shared diagnostics infrastructure.
member.param: The centralized logging service.
The handler for unexpected operation failures.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.FileHasher
member.summary: Generates read-only SHA-256 fingerprints using bounded asynchronous streaming.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.FileHasher.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService,OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.IErrorHandler)
member.summary: Initializes a file hasher using shared diagnostics infrastructure.
member.param: The centralized logging service.
The handler for unexpected operation failures.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.FileMetadataReader
member.summary: Reads operating-system filesystem metadata without opening or modifying file contents.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.FileMetadataReader.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService,OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.IErrorHandler)
member.summary: Initializes a metadata reader that records diagnostics through Core infrastructure.
member.param: The centralized logging service.
The handler used for unexpected operation-level failures.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.FileScanner
member.summary: Performs a read-only recursive traversal of selected filesystem directories.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.FileScanner.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService,OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.IErrorHandler)
member.summary: Initializes a file scanner that records diagnostics through shared Core infrastructure.
member.param: The centralized logging service.
The handler used for unexpected operation-level failures.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.IDuplicateDetector
member.summary: Identifies exact-content duplicate entries from previously calculated SHA-256 hashes.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.IDuplicateDetector.DetectAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileEntry},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Recalculates duplicate classifications and groups for the supplied entries.
member.param: The entries to evaluate in their required output order.
A token used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The enriched entries, duplicate groups, statistics, and recoverable issues.
member.exception: Thrown when an input collection contains a null entry.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.IFileClassifier
member.summary: Classifies entries using ordered metadata rules.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.IFileClassifier.ClassifyAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileEntry},OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassificationOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Classifies supplied entries.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.IFileHasher
member.summary: Generates SHA-256 fingerprints for eligible file entries.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.IFileHasher.HashAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileEntry},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Hashes supplied entries while preserving input order and multiplicity.
member.param: The entries to hash.
A token used to cancel hashing.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.IFileMetadataReader
member.summary: Enriches discovered file entries with filesystem metadata.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.IFileMetadataReader.ReadAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileEntry},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads filesystem metadata for the supplied entries while preserving their order and multiplicity.
member.param: The discovered file entries to enrich.
A token used to cancel metadata processing.
member.returns: A task containing the enriched entries and recoverable issues.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.IFileScanner
member.summary: Discovers files and directories below user-selected root directories without modifying them.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.IFileScanner.ScanAsync(OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanRequest,System.IProgress{OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Scans the requested root directories on a single background worker.
member.param: The roots and options that define the scan.
An optional receiver for scan progress updates.
A token used to request cooperative cancellation.
member.returns: A task containing completed or partial cancelled scan results.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DirectoryEntry
member.summary: Represents a directory discovered during a scan.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DirectoryEntry.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents a directory discovered during a scan.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateClassification
member.summary: Contains the recalculated exact-content duplicate state of a file entry.
member.param: The duplicate status assigned to the entry.
The deterministic duplicate-group identifier when the status is .

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateClassification.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateStatus,System.String)
member.summary: Contains the recalculated exact-content duplicate state of a file entry.
member.param: The duplicate status assigned to the entry.
The deterministic duplicate-group identifier when the status is .

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateClassification.Status
member.summary: The duplicate status assigned to the entry.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateClassification.GroupId
member.summary: The deterministic duplicate-group identifier when the status is .

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionIssue
member.summary: Describes one recoverable duplicate-detection issue for a file entry.
member.param: The entry path exactly as supplied.
The issue category.
A user-readable description of the issue.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionIssue.#ctor(System.String,OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionIssueKind,System.String)
member.summary: Describes one recoverable duplicate-detection issue for a file entry.
member.param: The entry path exactly as supplied.
The issue category.
A user-readable description of the issue.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionIssue.FilePath
member.summary: The entry path exactly as supplied.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionIssue.Kind
member.summary: The issue category.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionIssue.Message
member.summary: A user-readable description of the issue.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionIssueKind
member.summary: Identifies a recoverable hash-validation problem during duplicate detection.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionIssueKind.HashUnavailable
member.summary: No hash was available for the entry.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionIssueKind.UnsupportedHashAlgorithm
member.summary: The entry used a hash algorithm unsupported by this detector.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionIssueKind.InvalidHashValue
member.summary: The entry had a malformed SHA-256 hash value.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionResult
member.summary: Contains the enriched entries, duplicate groups, statistics, and recoverable issues from duplicate detection.
member.param: Entries in exactly the supplied input order.
Duplicate groups ordered by first hash appearance.
Aggregate detection statistics.
Recoverable hash-validation issues.

member.summary: Contains the enriched entries, duplicate groups, statistics, and recoverable issues from duplicate detection.
member.param: Entries in exactly the supplied input order.
Duplicate groups ordered by first hash appearance.
Aggregate detection statistics.
Recoverable hash-validation issues.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionResult.Files
member.summary: Entries in exactly the supplied input order.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionResult.Groups
member.summary: Duplicate groups ordered by first hash appearance.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionResult.Statistics
member.summary: Aggregate detection statistics.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionResult.Issues
member.summary: Recoverable hash-validation issues.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionStatistics
member.summary: Contains counts produced by a duplicate-detection operation.
member.param: The number of input entries examined.
The number of entries assigned .
The number of entries assigned .
The number of entries assigned .
The number of returned duplicate groups.
The number of returned recoverable issues.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionStatistics.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Contains counts produced by a duplicate-detection operation.
member.param: The number of input entries examined.
The number of entries assigned .
The number of entries assigned .
The number of entries assigned .
The number of returned duplicate groups.
The number of returned recoverable issues.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionStatistics.FilesProcessed
member.summary: The number of input entries examined.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionStatistics.FilesUnique
member.summary: The number of entries assigned .

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionStatistics.FilesDuplicate
member.summary: The number of entries assigned .

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionStatistics.FilesUnknown
member.summary: The number of entries assigned .

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionStatistics.DuplicateGroups
member.summary: The number of returned duplicate groups.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateDetectionStatistics.IssuesEncountered
member.summary: The number of returned recoverable issues.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateGroup
member.summary: Represents entries that share a normalized supported content hash.
member.param: The deterministic group identifier.
The normalized hash algorithm name.
The normalized lowercase hexadecimal hash value.
The enriched entries belonging to the group in input order.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateGroup.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileEntry})
member.summary: Represents entries that share a normalized supported content hash.
member.param: The deterministic group identifier.
The normalized hash algorithm name.
The normalized lowercase hexadecimal hash value.
The enriched entries belonging to the group in input order.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateGroup.GroupId
member.summary: The deterministic group identifier.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateGroup.Algorithm
member.summary: The normalized hash algorithm name.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateGroup.HashValue
member.summary: The normalized lowercase hexadecimal hash value.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateGroup.Files
member.summary: The enriched entries belonging to the group in input order.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateStatus
member.summary: Describes the exact-content duplicate state of a file entry.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateStatus.Unknown
member.summary: No supported hash is available for the entry.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateStatus.Unique
member.summary: The entry has a valid hash occurring exactly once.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateStatus.Duplicate
member.summary: The entry has a valid hash shared by multiple entries.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory
member.summary: Describes the single v0.1 category assigned to a file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Unknown
member.summary: No deterministic category was matched.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Document
member.summary: A text or document file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Spreadsheet
member.summary: A spreadsheet file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Presentation
member.summary: A presentation file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Image
member.summary: An image file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Audio
member.summary: An audio file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Video
member.summary: A video file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Archive
member.summary: An archive file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Code
member.summary: A source-code or markup file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Data
member.summary: A structured data file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Executable
member.summary: An executable or installer file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileCategory.Font
member.summary: A font file.

member.summary: Contains a deterministic file category.

member.summary: Contains a deterministic file category.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassificationIssue
member.summary: Describes a recoverable classification issue.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassificationIssue.#ctor(System.String,OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassificationIssueKind,System.String)
member.summary: Describes a recoverable classification issue.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassificationIssueKind
member.summary: Identifies a recoverable classification issue.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassificationIssueKind.MetadataUnavailable
member.summary: The file entry did not contain metadata required for classification.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassificationMatchKind
member.summary: Defines metadata used to match a classification rule.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassificationMatchKind.ExactFileName
member.summary: Matches the complete metadata filename.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassificationMatchKind.Extension
member.summary: Matches the metadata extension.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassificationOptions
member.summary: Contains ordered classification rules.

member.summary: Contains ordered classification rules.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassificationOptions.Default
member.summary: Gets approved built-in extension rules.

member.summary: Contains classified entries.

member.summary: Contains classified entries.

member.summary: Summarizes classification work.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileEntry
member.summary: Represents a file discovered during a scan.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileEntry.#ctor(System.String,OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadata,OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHash,OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileClassification,OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.DuplicateClassification)
member.summary: Represents a file discovered during a scan.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHash
member.summary: Contains a normalized file fingerprint.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHash.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Contains a normalized file fingerprint.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashIssue
member.summary: Describes a recoverable issue encountered while hashing one file.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashIssue.#ctor(System.String,OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashIssueKind,System.String)
member.summary: Describes a recoverable issue encountered while hashing one file.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashIssueKind
member.summary: Identifies a recoverable hashing issue.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashIssueKind.FileUnavailable
member.summary: The file path was invalid or unavailable.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashIssueKind.AccessDenied
member.summary: Access to the file was denied.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashIssueKind.FileChangedDuringHashing
member.summary: The file changed during best-effort hashing validation.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashIssueKind.FileUnreadable
member.summary: The file stream could not be opened or read.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashIssueKind.NonRegularFileSkipped
member.summary: The entry was not a regular file.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashIssueKind.ReparsePointSkipped
member.summary: The entry was a symbolic link, junction, or other reparse point.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashResult
member.summary: Contains hashed entries and recoverable hashing issues.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileEntry},OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashStatistics,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashIssue})
member.summary: Contains hashed entries and recoverable hashing issues.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashStatistics
member.summary: Summarizes work performed by file hashing.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileHashStatistics.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Summarizes work performed by file hashing.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadata
member.summary: Contains read-only filesystem metadata for a discovered file. Attributes are present whenever metadata is present.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadata.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.IO.FileAttributes)
member.summary: Contains read-only filesystem metadata for a discovered file. Attributes are present whenever metadata is present.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataIssue
member.summary: Describes a recoverable problem encountered while enriching one file.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataIssue.#ctor(System.String,OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataIssueKind,System.String)
member.summary: Describes a recoverable problem encountered while enriching one file.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataIssueKind
member.summary: Identifies a recoverable issue encountered while reading file metadata.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataIssueKind.FileUnavailable
member.summary: The file was missing, invalid, or otherwise unavailable.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataIssueKind.AccessDenied
member.summary: Access to the file or its metadata was denied.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataIssueKind.ReparsePointSkipped
member.summary: The entry was a symbolic link, junction, or other reparse point and was skipped.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataIssueKind.MetadataUnavailable
member.summary: One or more optional metadata fields could not be retrieved.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataResult
member.summary: Contains enriched file entries and recoverable metadata processing issues.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileEntry},OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataStatistics,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataIssue})
member.summary: Contains enriched file entries and recoverable metadata processing issues.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataStatistics
member.summary: Summarizes work completed by file metadata processing.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.FileMetadataStatistics.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Summarizes work completed by file metadata processing.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanIssue
member.summary: Describes a recoverable issue that prevented one filesystem location from being scanned.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanIssue.#ctor(System.String,OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanIssueKind,System.String)
member.summary: Describes a recoverable issue that prevented one filesystem location from being scanned.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanIssueKind
member.summary: Identifies a recoverable filesystem condition encountered during scanning.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanIssueKind.RootDirectoryUnavailable
member.summary: A requested root could not be reached as a directory.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanIssueKind.DirectoryUnavailable
member.summary: A directory could not be enumerated.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanIssueKind.EntryUnavailable
member.summary: An individual filesystem entry could not be inspected.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanIssueKind.AccessDenied
member.summary: Access to a filesystem location was denied.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanIssueKind.SymbolicLinkSkipped
member.summary: A reparse point was skipped because symbolic-link support is deferred.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanOptions
member.summary: Defines scanner behavior that is configurable for a single operation.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanOptions.#ctor(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Defines scanner behavior that is configurable for a single operation.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanOptions.Default
member.summary: Gets the default scanner options.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanProgress
member.summary: Provides a point-in-time view of work completed by an active scan.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanProgress.#ctor(System.String,OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanStatistics,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Provides a point-in-time view of work completed by an active scan.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanRequest
member.summary: Defines the root directories and options for one scan operation.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanRequest.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.String},OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanOptions)
member.summary: Defines the root directories and options for one scan operation.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanResult
member.summary: Contains all entries and recoverable issues produced by one scan operation.
Contains all entries and recoverable issues produced by one scan operation.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanStatistics
member.summary: Summarizes the entries and recoverable issues encountered during a scan.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanStatistics.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Summarizes the entries and recoverable issues encountered during a scan.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanStatus
member.summary: Describes the final outcome of a scan operation.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanStatus.Completed
member.summary: The scan traversed all reachable requested locations.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Scanner.Models.ScanStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: The scan ended after a cancellation request.
